package rulecoverage

func PositiveStmtWithoutClose() string {
    ruleID := "stmt_without_close"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Prepared statements or similar DB handles without an observed Close() call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
